Literal.Value:
'library(ggplot2)

month_order <- c("Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec")

dataset$month_factor <- factor(dataset[,2], levels=month_order)
dataset <- dataset[order(dataset$month_factor),]
dataset$month_index <- as.numeric(dataset$month_factor)

p <- ggplot(dataset, aes(x=month_index, y=dataset[,1])) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=0, ymax=dataset[,1]), fill="#5B8DBE", alpha=0.12) +
  geom_line(color="#5B8DBE", size=1.2) +
  geom_point(color="#5B8DBE", fill="white", size=3, shape=21, stroke=1.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=1:12, labels=month_order, expand=c(0.02,0.02)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=function(x) paste0(round(x/1000),"K"), expand=c(0,0.08)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y=element_line(color="#ADB5BD", size=0.3),
    panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(color="#495057", size=9),
    axis.text=element_text(color="#6C757D", size=8)
  ) +
  labs(y="Order Lines")

print(p)'
